name: market-report
description: Generates a comprehensive crypto market report using CoinMarketCap MCP data. Use when users ask about overall market conditions, sentiment, or want a summary. Also use for questions about fear/greed, BTC dominance, altcoin season, trending narratives, or general "how's the market" queries. Trigger: "market report", "market overview", "what's happening in crypto", "market sentiment", "fear and greed", "is it altcoin season", "/market-report"
